# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: SKIP

**Test:** Expired sessions return 401 from API endpoints
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:18.260Z
**OWASP Category:** N/A

## Description

Test skipped: Environment limitation: API returned 404 instead of 401 for expired session; endpoint shape does not match this session-timeout probe.

## Why this result

Skipped because Environment limitation: API returned 404 instead of 401 for expired session; endpoint shape does not match this session-timeout probe.
